agents.agent_role: Interpret market narrative, risk appetite, panic or euphoria tone, and narrative rotation.
agents.summary: This desk interprets market narrative posture, crowding warnings, and sentiment contradictions to identify clean vs. dirty headlines influencing tape movement.
key_findings: [DATASET] GOOGL: Bullish sentiment with 2 clean headlines but 4 dirty headlines (e.g., SpaceX, OpenAI IPO) diluting narrative
[NEWS] AAPL: Neutral sentiment with 3 clean headlines but 2 dirty headlines (e.g., Intel, Iran deals) creating noise
[THESIS] Clean narrative rotation requires filtering out geopolitical and macro events from headline mix
risk_flags: P1: GOOGL clean headline count (2) below threshold for clean tape influence
P2: AAPL dirty headline count (2) amplifying sentiment contradictions
P3: Mixed narrative tone with no clear dominant narrative
blind_spots: Insufficient live news data to confirm clean headline impact on tape
